user.title: Connect to Durin
user.description: Enter your 6-digit Durin code from the Durin Mobile App to link this Home Assistant instance.

data_description.residence_code: Obtain this 6-digit code from the Durin Mobile App in the Residence you want to link.

error.invalid_code: Invalid Durin code. The code must be exactly 6 digits.
error.code_expired: This Durin code has expired. Please generate a new code in the Durin app.
error.connection_failed: Unable to connect to the Durin backend. Please check your internet connection.
error.unknown: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

abort.already_configured: This Durin installation is already configured.

init.title: Durin Options
init.description: Configuration is managed through the Durin platform. Use a new code to reconfigure.
